headline: Jim Cramer on Medtronic (MDT): “I Think That Everything They’ve Been Doing Lately Is Right”
summary: Medtronic plc (NYSE:MDT) was featured on Mad Money as Jim Cramer shared his take on the stock amid a sliding macro environment. When a caller asked about the stock, Cramer said: I have to tell you, I was surprised that Medtronic got back down to the high $80s. I think that everything they’ve been doing […]

headline: Medtronic’s Stealth AXiS FDA Win Meets Mixed Share Performance
summary: Medtronic (NYSE:MDT) received U.S. FDA clearance for its Stealth AXiS surgical system for cranial and ENT procedures. The platform combines AI enabled planning, navigation, and robotics for use across multiple surgical specialties. Key features include AI based tractography and intraoperative ultrasound integration aimed at more precise and informed procedures. Medtronic enters this new phase for Stealth AXiS with its shares trading at $87.14 and a mixed recent track record, with a 1.1%...
